PLAYTIME CO. © — ALL TOYS ARE ALIVE — ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK
? HOW TO PLAY
🎮 MOVEMENT
W A S DMove around
SHIFTSprint (drains stamina)
👁 LOOK
MOUSELook around (click to lock)
I / KLook up / Look down
J / LLook left / Look right
🔧 ACTIONS
EInteract with panels & objects
ESCPause game
🎯 OBJECTIVE
First, find and activate 6 light poles scattered around the factory to restore power. Then solve 3 power panels to unlock the exit — but beware, Huggy Wuggy is watching...
⚠️ TIPS
• Stay moving — Huggy gets faster as you solve puzzles
• Watch your stamina before sprinting
• Reach the exit vent before he catches you!

PLAYTIME CO.
EMPLOYEE ORIENTATION — CONFIDENTIAL
📼  Welcome back. We've been waiting for you.
🏭  You were one of our best. Then you disappeared.
⚠️  The factory has been... quiet. Too quiet.
🔧  Your GrabPack is on the welcome desk. Take it.
🧸  Restore power to the three panels. Exit through the north.
⚡  Do not let the toys find you. They are not what they seem.
PT-TAPE-01 ◀▶
[ CLICK OR PRESS ENTER TO SKIP ]
YOU FOUND THE GRABPACK
✋
🤚
The GrabPack is your only tool in the factory.
LEFT CLICK — Red hand: pull switches & activate panels
RIGHT CLICK — Blue hand: push and unlock mechanisms

Use [E] to interact when close to objects.
Controls: WASD move  ·  MOUSE look  ·  K/L turn left/right  ·  SHIFT sprint  ·  E interact  ·  ESC pause
🎯 Restore factory power

● REC
⚠ EMERGENCY PROTOCOL ⚠
HUGGY WUGGY HAS BEEN RELEASED.
He is now in the VENTS — and he is HUNTING YOU.
To survive: SPACE or CLICK to crawl forward.
The faster you crawl, the further ahead you stay.
Do NOT stop moving. Huggy gains on you every second.
Reach the EXIT before he catches you. Good luck.
[CLICK OR PRESS ENTER TO START THE CHASE]
WALK FORWARD
THE DOOR IS OPEN...
POWER CUBE CHAMBER
FIND AND PLACE ALL POWER CUBES IN THE MARKED SLOTS
CUBES PLACED: 0 / 5
Click a blue cube to pick it up, then click a yellow slot to place it.
Locked cubes need a correct answer to unlock. Find all 5.
🤚
RED HAND ACQUIRED
You found the other half of the GrabPack.
Press M to fire the Red Hand.
You cross the metallic bridge...
HE'S FALLING...
POPPY'S VINTAGE ROOM
You enter the dim, forgotten room. A glass case sits at the center...
POPPY...
The glass case clicks open. A small hand reaches out.
